raw_consumer_statement:
Hello I received your letter and below are the emails I sent to Citi Bank and the XXXX XXXX merchant : From : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  Hello, I have submitted below all the emails associated with this dispute! If you do not refund me the money, I will report you as well to the federal government. You chose to believe the merchant over me! I had to call and reopen this and you never gave me the opportunity to respond to the merchant 's lies!

I canceled as I was instructed to do! and if you would have simply checked my account history, you would see that at first, they canceled and refunded me the full amount! Then they tried charging me again, which I never authorized!!!

Then had to immediately cancel my previous card because of them!! I can not believe you allowed this and were believing the merchant!

Your process is obviously flawed and needs improvement. 

Thank you, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX refund has been issued STOP CHARGING MY CREDIT CARD! Why did you charge me again when I already canceled and you gave me a refund? You have already been reported to FTC! cancel this charge immediately!
